title: athanasia squarrosa
intro: Athanasia squarrosa, also known as Alpine Arnica, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Athanasia squarrosa include reducing pain and swelling, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Athanasia squarrosa can be found in topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as in tinctures and infusions, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
